records.summary_analyst: CVE-2025-49113 affects Roundcube Webmail by allowing remote attackers to exploit a vulnerability in the application's file handling mechanism that could lead to arbitrary file upload and code execution.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2025-49113 represents a critical vulnerability in Roundcube Webmail that could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive user data, posing significant business risks and necessitating immediate remediation to prevent potential data breaches.
records.description: CVE-2025-49113 affects Roundcube Webmail by allowing remote attackers to exploit a vulnerability in the application's file handling mechanism that could lead to arbitrary file upload and code execution.

news_article.title: U.S. CISA adds RoundCube Webmail flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2024-43468 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Configuration Manager 2403 that allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code by manipulating the handling of crafted network packets.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2024-43468 presents a critical vulnerability in Microsoft Configuration Manager 2403 that could lead to unauthorized access and data breaches, necessitating immediate remediation to protect sensitive organizational information and maintain compliance.
records.description: CVE-2024-43468 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Configuration Manager 2403 that allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code by manipulating the handling of crafted network packets.

news_article.title: CISA Adds Four Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-1731 is a vulnerability in Beyondtrust Privileged Remote Access that allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the affected system due to improper input validation in the application's authentication mechanism.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-1731 poses a critical risk to BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access, exposing sensitive organizational assets to potential unauthorized access, thus necessitating immediate mitigation to safeguard against significant operational and reputational damage.
records.description: CVE-2026-1731 is a vulnerability in Beyondtrust Privileged Remote Access that allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the affected system due to improper input validation in the application's authentication mechanism.

news_article.title: Hackers probe, exploit newly patched BeyondTrust RCE flaw (CVE-2026-1731)

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-22769 affects Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines by allowing an authenticated attacker to exploit improper access control in the web interface, potentially leading to unauthorized changes in system configurations.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-22769 poses a critical vulnerability in Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines that could lead to unauthorized access and data breaches, exposing our organization to significant operational and financial risks, necessitating immediate remediation efforts.
records.description: CVE-2026-22769 affects Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines by allowing an authenticated attacker to exploit improper access control in the web interface, potentially leading to unauthorized changes in system configurations.

news_article.title: China-linked snoops have been exploiting Dell 0-day since mid-2024, using 'ghost NICs' to avoid detection

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2025-40536 allows remote attackers to exploit an improper input validation vulnerability in the Solarwinds Web Help Desk, enabling unauthorized access to sensitive data and potential manipulation of the system.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2025-40536 exposes SolarWinds Web Help Desk to significant risk of unauthorized access and potential data breaches, requiring immediate mitigation to safeguard sensitive customer and organizational information.
records.description: CVE-2025-40536 allows remote attackers to exploit an improper input validation vulnerability in the Solarwinds Web Help Desk, enabling unauthorized access to sensitive data and potential manipulation of the system.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-21513 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Windows 10 1607 that allows an attacker to exploit a memory corruption issue to execute arbitrary code in the context of the affected system.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-21513 presents a critical vulnerability in Microsoft Windows 10 1607 that could allow attackers to gain unauthorized access to sensitive data, posing significant exposure risks to our organization, and urgent action is required to mitigate this threat to protect our assets and ensure business continuity.
records.description: CVE-2026-21513 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Windows 10 1607 that allows an attacker to exploit a memory corruption issue to execute arbitrary code in the context of the affected system.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-2441 is a vulnerability in Google Chrome that allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code by leveraging a heap buffer overflow in the browser's rendering engine.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-2441 poses an immediate threat to Google Chrome users, potentially exposing sensitive data and organizational assets to cyberattacks, highlighting the urgent need for prompt security updates to mitigate this vulnerability.
records.description: CVE-2026-2441 is a vulnerability in Google Chrome that allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code by leveraging a heap buffer overflow in the browser's rendering engine.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-20700 is a vulnerability in Apple iPadOS that allows attackers to exploit a memory corruption issue in the operating system's components, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-21525 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Windows 10 1607 that allows an attacker to exploit a local elevation of privilege due to improper handling of objects in memory, enabling them to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-21525 poses a critical vulnerability in Microsoft Windows 10 1607 that could allow attackers to execute malicious code, potentially compromising sensitive business data and requiring immediate attention to mitigate the risk of exploitation.
records.description: CVE-2026-21525 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Windows 10 1607 that allows an attacker to exploit a local elevation of privilege due to improper handling of objects in memory, enabling them to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.
